title: Pricing and Packaging Strategy Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Pricing and Packaging Strategy skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

full_cost_structure.description: Full cost structure including variable cost per unit, fixed cost base, and current gross margin by product line

competitor_pricing_data.description: Competitor pricing data including price levels, pricing model type, and packaging tiers

existing_customer_data.description: Existing customer data on average revenue per user or account, churn rates by price tier, and upgrade/downgrade patterns

customer_willingness.description: Customer willingness-to-pay data from surveys, conjoint analysis, or sales conversation intelligence

price_elasticity_estimates.description: Price elasticity estimates from historical pricing experiments or econometric modeling

sales_team_winloss.description: Sales team win/loss data with price-related attribution
